name: Duck Creek Technologies Insurance Platform API
what_it_does: Duck Creek Technologies REST API for P&C insurance policy administration, claims management, and rating automation. Enables AI agents to manage policy lifecycle from quote to bind for insurance underwriting automation, handle claims first notice of loss (FNOL) and claims processing for P&C claims workflow automation, access rating and product configuration for insurance pricing automation, retrieve billing and payment management for insurance premium collection automation, manage agent and distribution portal integration for insurance distribution workflow, handle reinsurance and treaty management for ceded premium reporting, access analytics and regulatory reporting for insurance compliance, retrieve policy endorsement and change management for mid-term policy modification, manage subrogation and recovery workflow for claims cost management, and integrate Duck Creek with ISO, ACORD, and insurance data exchange standards.
use_cases: Automating policy issuance from insurance underwriting agents
Processing FNOL from P&C claims agents
Managing rating changes from insurance product agents
Reporting regulatory data from insurance compliance agents
not_for: Life and annuity insurance without P&C focus
Small insurance agencies without core system integration
Organizations using Guidewire or Majesco exclusively
best_when: A P&C insurance carrier using Duck Creek wants AI agents to automate policy administration, claims processing, rating management, and regulatory compliance reporting.
avoid_when: STATE INSURANCE REGULATORY RISK: Duck Creek manages state-filed insurance products — automated rate, form, or rule changes must comply with state insurance department filing requirements; unauthorized rate changes create state regulatory penalty and market conduct exam risk. FCRA claims data — claims history data used in underwriting must comply with FCRA adverse action and disclosure requirements. Insurance fraud detection automation — automated fraud scoring used to deny or restrict claims must provide required adverse action notices; algorithmic claims denial without human review creates bad faith claims handling liability.

auth.notes: Duck Creek uses OAuth 2.0. API documentation via Duck Creek developer portal. Webhooks for insurance events. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2000. Public (DCT NASDAQ, 2020-2023), then taken private by Vista Equity Partners ($2.6B, 2023). 200+ P&C insurance carrier customers. Strong in commercial lines and specialty insurance. Competes with Guidewire and Majesco for P&C core systems.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Boston, MA. Founded 2000. Vista Equity Partners-backed (private 2023). 200+ P&C carriers. Commercial and specialty insurance focus. Competes with Guidewire for P&C core systems.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: STATE FILING COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated rate or form changes to Duck Creek products require state insurance department prior approval in regulated states; unauthorized rate implementation creates state market conduct exam and fine risk

Bad faith claims handling — automated claims denial or reservation of rights without human adjuster review creates bad faith insurance claims liability; P&C claims AI must support, not replace, adjuster judgment

FCRA underwriting data use — automated use of claims history and credit data in underwriting must comply with FCRA adverse action notice requirements; algorithmic underwriting denial without FCRA notice creates regulatory violation
ACORD standard compliance — Duck Creek data exchange uses ACORD XML/JSON standards; automated policy and claims data exchange must conform to correct ACORD transaction version
Reinsurance cedeing accuracy — automated cession of premium and losses to reinsurance treaties requires accurate treaty mapping; reinsurance data errors create treaty reporting and recovery issues

Multi-state product complexity — P&C insurance products have state-specific endorsements, exclusions, and rating factors; automated policy issuance must apply correct state-specific product configuration
agent_readiness.security_notes: P&C insurance core systems. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Insurance policy and claims data.

security_score_components.security_notes: P&C insurance. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Policy, claims, and insured data.
